perturbed_task_language: Pick the akita black bowl on the ramekin and place it on the plate
perturbation_semantics: target chosen by spatial relation 'on the ramekin' (vs sibling task t5 P1 which was 'on the cookie box')
strategy_notes: P2 swap re-randomized positions vs sibling task_t5 (which targeted bowl-on-cookie-box). Used SAM3 segmentation on agentview hi-res to identify the bowl semantically: first prompt 'black bowl on the small gray ramekin cup' segmented the WRONG (table-level) bowl at world (+0.05,+0.22,0.928); re-prompted with 'elevated bowl sitting on top of the small cup near the back' which correctly highlighted the BACK-LEFT bowl at world (-0.236,+0.188,0.975) — elevated z confirms it sits on the ramekin pedestal. Wrist refinement after pre-position confirmed at (-0.218,+0.180,0.969), spatially consistent. Plate segmented at (+0.081,-0.001,0.928) with score 0.973. Pi0_pick with the full task language verbatim succeeded in 9 chunks (peak_lift=0.0675m, gripper_qpos=0.0025) — gripper held the rim. set_gripper +1 firmed the grip, then carried via two-stage move (split |dx|≈0.28 across waypoint at (+0.05,+0.10,1.18)). Applied BOWL rim-hook compensation: eef_y target = plate_y + 0.045 = +0.044. Descent to z=1.00 then release fired the predicate. libero_terminated=true.
